scenarios.reply_summary: Confirmed indexing completed, mentioned 278 documents registered as 'concepts_index'
scenarios.notes: Ran cleanly end-to-end; embed_progress and index_write postprocessor steps completed.

scenarios.reply_summary: Skill spawn-acked then failed in background; final reply asks for more info, does not report skill generated or lint passed
scenarios.notes: skill_run_failed: LLM returned invalid JSON after repair+retry. The 'rollback' control type caused a JSON escape error in the LLM response. Rubric item 1 (skill generated/lint passed) not met. skill_run_completed not in must_emit events.

scenarios.reply_summary: Returned computed stats: 44 characters, 1 line, ~11 tokens for the input text
scenarios.notes: All rubric items met. Stats are consistent with the 44-char input.

scenarios.reply_summary: Returned 128 characters, 4 lines, longest line 40 chars for multi-line input
scenarios.notes: Skill ran 3 times (retries or multiple dispatch). All completions successful. Final reply references precomputed statistics accurately.

scenarios.reply_summary: LLM described the eval action arguments instead of invoking it; no eval result reported
scenarios.notes: No routing_decided event emitted. LLM used list_actions then explained what eval does rather than calling invoke_action. Rubric items 1 and 3 not met.

scenarios.reply_summary: All 5 turns returned non-empty replies about Reyn architecture
scenarios.notes: Rubric (non-empty reply) met. But must_emit compacted_message_added NOT fired. Compaction checks consistently below_min_batch and below_threshold — the lowered threshold config (trigger_total_tokens=2000, min_compact_batch=2) in reyn.local.yaml was present, but actual conversation token count stayed below trigger across 5 turns. This is the same failure mode as B56 W2.

scenarios.reply_summary: Turn 2 reply says 'I have indexed the following Markdown files' but lists all docs/concepts/ files without mentioning 'arch_events_index' as source name
scenarios.notes: Events pass and artifacts present. Source was correctly set to 'arch_events_index' in skill input (confirmed in task_completed injection). But rubric item 2 requires the reply to reference 'arch_events_index' as the source name — the final reply text does not mention it. Path was also expanded to docs/concepts/*.md instead of the specific 2 files requested.

new_findings.title: search_actions offered in 50/64 requests but called 0 times (W2)
new_findings.description: LLM trace shows search_actions was included in the available tools for 50 out of 64 LLM requests. The LLM made zero calls to search_actions across all scenarios. Instead it used list_actions (7 calls) and describe_action calls. This replicates B56 W2 pattern (0/N). The B57 batch-level hypothesis about search_actions description symmetry fix should be evaluated by comparing search_actions call rate in W1 (different scenario set) vs W2.
new_findings.primary_data: LLM trace: 64 requests, 50 offered search_actions, 0 LLM tool_calls to search_actions. All tool calls: describe_action, file__glob, invoke_action, list_actions, read_tool_result, reyn.source__list, skill__index_docs, source__read, web__search
new_findings.batch_comparison: B56 W2: 0/N search_actions calls (per worker prompt). B57 W2: 0/N. No improvement observed for W2 scenario set.

new_findings.title: chat_compactor_auto_trigger: below_min_batch despite lowered config
new_findings.description: Despite reyn.local.yaml having trigger_total_tokens=2000, head_size=1, tail_size=1, min_compact_batch=2, the 5-turn conversation never triggered compaction. compaction_check showed below_min_batch (3 times) then below_threshold (2 times). This suggests the actual token counts across 5 turns of architectural explanation did not exceed 2000 tokens — or the check logic has a different count than expected.
new_findings.primary_data: compaction_check events: 5 total. outcomes: below_min_batch x3, below_threshold x2. No compacted_message_added emitted.
new_findings.batch_comparison: B56 W2 chat_compactor: same failure (R). Pattern persists in B57.

new_findings.title: skill_builder JSON escape error in rollback control type
new_findings.description: skill_builder failed with 'LLM returned invalid JSON after repair and retry. Invalid \escape'. The raw response shows the LLM chose control type 'rollback' which is not a valid OS control type (valid: transition/finish/abort). The LLM encoded a skill-specific concept as a control type, triggering a JSON parse error on the escaped path string in the reason summary.
new_findings.primary_data: skill_run_failed event: error='LLM returned invalid JSON after repair and retry. Error: Invalid \escape: line 1 column 206 (char 205). Raw response: {"type": "decide", "control": {"type": "rollback"...}}'
